message:
test(e2e): add cancellation stress E2E suite (bd-jj62v)

11 stress tests covering cancellation storm (50 tasks), mixed cancel
reasons, 5-level timeout cascades, wide-tree propagation (10 children ×
3 tasks), race losers, cancel mask depth, cause-chain attribution,
negative-path detection, deterministic replay, and finalizer-heavy
workloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
